programme.desc: Brianna Foisy, 21, and Jason Netter, 41, are killed on an Alaskan bike path in 2016; it's a crime that baffles police, until similar murders begin to happen; police follow clues in a shocking murder to track the killer.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates looks closely at some of history's most intriguing hoaxes and unexplained events, including the Amityville Horror, the strange fate of a military submarine crew, and a phenomenon in which people's body fat causes them to burn alive.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: A new study suggests the Shroud of Turin may be authentic, while researchers analyze old ghost photos with new tools; the creator of the Georgia Guidestones is identified.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: From a secret World War II unit that deceived Nazis, to the alleged crimes of the Knights Templar, and a royal death tied to a scandal, Josh Gates explores mysteries built on coverups. Was the truth buried to protect power, reputation, and empires?

programme.title: Restoring Galveston

programme.title: Restoring Galveston

programme.title: Restoring Galveston

programme.title: Restoring Galveston

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
